title: Department of Nursing Master's Program Mission and Vision
content:
Department of Nursing Master's Program Mission and Vision

Department of Nursing Master's Program Mission and Vision

Vision:

Our vision is to be a leading force at national and international level in improving the health of the society through nursing education, research and practices.

Mission:

Our mission is to train leading nurses who are able to conduct education, research and practice based on scientific and ethical values in order to protect and improve the health of the society.
